title: From the brink to a breather: Trump's Iran pivot buys time, not trust
summary_full: The United States and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire. This pause follows days of escalating strikes and threats. Pakistan played a key role in brokering the truce. Talks are scheduled for Friday in Islamabad. The agreement aims to de-escalate tensions and open a path for diplomacy. Global oil prices had surged significantly during the conflict.
